Product_Observational.xsi:schemaLocation: http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/pds/v1 http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/pds/v1/PDS4_PDS_1D00.xsd http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/geom/v1 http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/geom/v1/PDS4_GEOM_1B10_1700.xsd http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/img/v1 http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/img/v1/PDS4_IMG_1B00_1610.xsd http://psa.esa.int/psa/v1 https://psa.esa.int/psa/v1/PDS4_PSA_1101.xsd http://psa.esa.int/psa/emrsp/rm/v1 https://psa.esa.int/psa/emrsp/rm/v1/PDS4_PSA_EMRSP_RM_1D00_1100.xsd http://psa.esa.int/psa/emrsp/rm/pan/v1 https://psa.esa.int/psa/emrsp/rm/v1/PDS4_PSA_EMRSP_RM_PAN_1D00_1000.xsd http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/msn/v1 http://pds.nasa.gov/pds4/msn/v1/PDS4_MSN_1B00_1100.xsd

Primary_Result_Summary.description: This product contains housekeeping data of the PanCam instrument

File.comment: A table containing the consolidated PanCam HK from a single Sol with calibrations applied where useful.

Field_Delimited.name: OBT_COARSE_TIMESTAMP
Field_Delimited.description: This field represents the RAW rover on-board clock timestamp coarse part of a CCSDS unsegmented time code CUC(4,2) timestamp.

Field_Delimited.name: OBT_FINE_TIMESTAMP
Field_Delimited.description: This field represents the RAW rover on-board clock timestamp fine part of a CCSDS unsegmented time code CUC(4,2) timestamp.

Field_Delimited.name: Packet Criticality
Field_Delimited.description: The criticality of HK for this record.

Field_Delimited.name: Packet Type
Field_Delimited.description: The type of HK for this record.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_PCS_CE
Field_Delimited.description: Enabled Camera

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_PCS_PSS
Field_Delimited.description: Powered camera

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_REFV
Field_Delimited.description: PIU Reference Voltage 5V line used to sample voltages and temperatures.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_6V0
Field_Delimited.description: DCDC 6.0V line sampled after filtering on the PIU board. Supply voltage used by PIU and peripherals.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_1V5
Field_Delimited.description: DCDC 1.5V line after filtering on the PIU board. Supply voltage used on PIU for the RTAX2000 FPGA.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_LFWT
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel temperature. Measurement of the PT1000 temperature sensor bonded directly onto the filter wheel motor housing case.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_RFWT
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel temperature. Measurement of the PT1000 temperature sensor bonded directly onto the filter wheel motor housing case.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_HRCT
Field_Delimited.description: HRC interface temperature. Mesaurement of the PT1000 temperature sensor mounted on the reverse of the HRC PCB aligned with the RTAX FPGA, measureed by the PIU.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_LWACT
Field_Delimited.description: Left WAC interface temperature. Measurement of the PT1000 temperature sensor mounted internally to the WAC cube and mounted in close proximity to the imaging sensor.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_RWACT
Field_Delimited.description: Right WAC interface temperature. Measurement of the PT1000 temperature sensor mounted internally to the WAC cube and mounted in close proximity to the imaging sensor.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_LDOT
Field_Delimited.description: PIU LDO temperature. Measurement of the PT1000 temperature sensor mounted directly onto the PIU Low DropOut regulator, the largest heat dissipator component on the PIU board.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_HRCAT
Field_Delimited.description: HRC actuator temperature. Measurement of the PT1000 temperature sensor bonded directly onto the HRC focus mechanism motor housing case.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWR_CMD
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel command error. Flag asserted when PIU in wrong state for command type, command structure is incorrect or not recognised. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWL_CMD
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel command error. Flga asserted when PIU in wrong state for command type, command structure is incorrect or not recognised. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_MEM_OVERF
Field_Delimited.description: Image write passed end of memory error. Flag asserted whenever the last image write to the PIU SDRAM exceeds the highest addressable location, image writing then continues from the start of the SDRAM memory. Flag can only be cleared following the next successful image write to memory or after a PIU reset. In nominal operation, the PIU will always write images to the start of SDRAM and always overwrite the previously received image. Therefore, this error can only be raised if the image base address is manually altered.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_OP_TIMEOUT
Field_Delimited.description: RMAP operation timed out error. The logic to assert this flag has not been implemented, therefore this flag shall always be FALSE.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_CMD_PIU_STAT
Field_Delimited.description: PIU in incorrect state for received command type error. The command is rejected and not executed. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_CMD_PV_OOR
Field_Delimited.description: Parameter value out of expected range error. The logic to assert this flag has not been implemented, therefore this flag shall always be FALSE.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_CMD_NO_PARA
Field_Delimited.description: Incorrect number of telecommand parameters error. Flag asserted whenever the recived number of parameters within a telecommand does not match thoese expected for the specified telecommand block ID. Command is rejected and not executed. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_CMD_NOT_RCG
Field_Delimited.description: Command not recognised error. Flag asserted when the command block ID received is not contained within the list of allowed PanCam commands. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWL_RPOS
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel "Move Relative Number" error. Flag asserted when the debug command "Move Left Filter Relative filter number" is used and the PIU exceeds the maximum number of rotation steps before the target change in filter number is located. During nominal operation debug commands will not be sent and this flag not asserted. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWL_POS
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel "Move to Filter Number" error. Flag asserted when the command "Move to Filter Number" is used and the PIU exceeds the maximum number of rotation steps before the target filter number is located. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWL_IND
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel index error. Flag asserted when the number of steps rotated by the left filter wheel exceeds the maximum number expected before an Index signal is observed. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWL_HOME
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel home error. Flag asserted when the number of steps rotated by the left filter wheel exceeds the maximum number expected before a Home signal is observed. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWR_RPOS
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel "Move Relative Number" error. Flag asserted when the debug command "Move Right Filter Relative filter number" is used and the PIU exceeds the maximum number of rotation steps before the target change in filter number is located. During nominal operation debug commands will not be sent and this flag not asserted. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWR_POS
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel "Move to Filter Number" error. Flag asserted when the command "Move to Filter Number" is used and the PIU exceeds the maximum number of rotation steps before the target filter number is located. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWR_IND
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel index error. Flag asserted when the number of steps rotated by the right filter wheel exceeds the maximum number expected before an Index signal is observed. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR1_FWR_HOME
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel home error. Flag asserted when the number of steps rotated by the right filter wheel exceeds the maximum number expected before a Home signal is observed. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACL_IMGCRC
Field_Delimited.description: Left WAC failed image CRC16 check error. Flag asserted when the PIU calculated CRC16 of the image stored within the PIU SDRAM is different from the CRC16 reported in the WAC data transfer response packet to the PIU. This indicates there is likely corruption or missing data within the received image and the image should be resent or recaptured. Error asserted until a new image is received and the error is cleared, or the PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACL_CMDCRC
Field_Delimited.description: Left WAC failed telemetry CRC check error. Flag asserted when the PIU calculated CRC8 of the WAC response does not match the CRC8 included in the WAC response packet. This indicates there is likely corruption or missing data in the WAC telemetry received by the PIU. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACL_CMD_TO
Field_Delimited.description: Left WAC command response timeout error. Flag asserted when the PIU does not receive a response within 7ms of sending a WAC command. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACL_NAK
Field_Delimited.description: Left WAC NAK response received. Flag asserted when the PIU receives the WAC telemetry Not Acknowledged response. The WAC camera response details the type of NAK received. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACL_N_PWR
Field_Delimited.description: Left WAC command received but Left WAC not powered error. Flag asserted when the PIU receives a Left WAC command but the current powered camera is not the Left WAC. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACR_IMGCRC
Field_Delimited.description: Right WAC failed image CRC16 check error. Flag asserted when the PIU calculated CRC16 of the image stored within the PIU SDRAM is different from the CRC16 reported in the WAC data transfer response packet to the PIU. This indicates there is likely corruption or missing data within the received image and the image should be resent or recaptured. Error asserted until a new image is received and the error is cleared, or the PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACR_CMDCRC
Field_Delimited.description: Right WAC failed telemetry CRC check error. Flag asserted when the PIU calculated CRC8 of the WAC response does not match the CRC8 included in the WAC response packet. This indicates there is likely corruption or missing data in the WAC telemetry received by the PIU. Error asserted cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACR_CMD_TO
Field_Delimited.description: Right WAC command response timeout error. Flag asserted when the PIU does not receive a response within 7ms of sending a WAC command. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACR_NAK
Field_Delimited.description: Right WAC NAK response received. Flag asserted when the PIU receives the WAC telemetry Not Acknowledged response. The WAC camera response details the type of NAK received. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR2_WACR_N_PWR
Field_Delimited.description: Right WAC command received but Right WAC not powered error. Flag asserted when the PIU receives a Right WAC command but the current powered camera is not the Right WAC. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR3_HRC_DS_TO
Field_Delimited.description: HRC Data-Strobe timeout error. Flag asserted if the PIU does not receive an expected image data character from the HRC within the 5.25ms timeout. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR3_HRC_IMG_ERR
Field_Delimited.description: HRC image error. Flag asserted if the HRC null token is not received within the 5.25ms timeout, following the transmission of the image data from the HRC to the PIU. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR3_HRC_INTG_TO
Field_Delimited.description: HRC image intergration timeout error. Flag asserted if the PIU does not receive HRC image data within the PIU calculated timeout. The PIU calculated timeout is based upon the PIU recorded current integration time extracted from the Set Integration Time command or the reported integration time found in Register Block 2. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR3_HRC_CMD_TO
Field_Delimited.description: HRC command timeout error. Flag asserted if the PIU does not receive a HRC HK response within 8.19ms of the PIU sending a command to the HRC. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR3_HRC_CRC
Field_Delimited.description: HRC image data parity error. Flag asserted if the PIU incoming HRC image byte fails the parity check. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR3_HRC_NAK
Field_Delimited.description: HRC command not acknowledged error. Flag asserted if the HRC HK response CMD ID received by the PIU does not match the command sent to HRC. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: TM_HK_ERR3_HRC_N_PWR
Field_Delimited.description: HRC command received but HRC not powered error. Flag asserted when the PIU receives a HRC command but the current powered camera is not the HRC. Error asserted until cleared or PIU reset.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_TCS_STAT
Field_Delimited.description: PIU temperature control heater active status. A TRUE flag denotes power is being applied to the cameara heater and it is currently enabled and warming the selected camera. A FALSE flag denotes the heater is disabled and no power is applied.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_TCS_MODE
Field_Delimited.description: PIU temperature control mode flag. A TRUE flag denotes that the PIU is in automatic regulation mode and the heater will be automatically enabled and disabled. A FALSE flag denotes manual mode and the heater status is set via command.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_TCS_HEAT
Field_Delimited.description: PIU temperature control camera selection.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_TCS_SET_RAW
Field_Delimited.description: PIU temperature contol setpoint for automatic regulation in RAW units.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_TCS_SET
Field_Delimited.description: PIU temperature contol setpoint for automatic regulation with camera calibration applied.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_LOP
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel powered flag. A TRUE flag denotes that power is currently being applied to the filter wheel motor.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_LHM
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter home flag. A TRUE flag denotes that the Home location indicator is currently active.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_LIDX
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter index flag. A TRUE flag denotes that the Index location indicator is currently acitve.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_LFN
Field_Delimited.description: Current filter position of the left filter wheel.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_LFWAS
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel number of motor steps moved from the last Home indicator.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_LFWRS
Field_Delimited.description: Left filter wheel number of motor steps moved from the last Index indicator.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_ROP
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel powered flag. A TRUE flag denotes that power is currently being applied to the filter wheel motor.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_RHM
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter home flag. A TRUE flag denotes that the Home location indicator is currently active.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_RIDX
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter index flag. A TRUE flag denotes that the Index location indicator is currently acitve.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_FWS_RFN
Field_Delimited.description: Current filter position of the right filter wheel.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_RFWAS
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel number of motor steps moved from the last Home indicator.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HK_RFWRS
Field_Delimited.description: Right filter wheel number of motor steps moved from the last Index indicator.

Table_Delimited.name: all-hk-non_crit
Table_Delimited.description: HK Elements only contained within the non-critical telemetry

Field_Delimited.name: OBT_COARSE_TIMESTAMP
Field_Delimited.description: This field represents the RAW rover on-board clock timestamp coarse part of a CCSDS unsegmented time code CUC(4,2) timestamp.

Field_Delimited.name: OBT_FINE_TIMESTAMP
Field_Delimited.description: This field represents the RAW rover on-board clock timestamp fine part of a CCSDS unsegmented time code CUC(4,2) timestamp.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_SIID_SOL
Field_Delimited.description: The mission sol day reported by the PIU, set by the set image ID command.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_SIID_TID
Field_Delimited.description: The acquisition type id set by the image ID command. Used to indicate ground processing workflow and product attributes.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_SIID_TRN
Field_Delimited.description: Acquisition sequence number. The count of the number of acquisition types executed during a sol, set by the set image ID command.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_SIID_PC
Field_Delimited.description: Current powered camera. As reported in image ancillary data

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_SIID_FW
Field_Delimited.description: Current active filter for the current powered camera. As reported in image ancillary data

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_SIID_IN
Field_Delimited.description: Image counter, starting at 1, of the number of images sent to the PIU from the cameras since PanCam power-up or reset.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_VER
Field_Delimited.description: The PIU FPGA firmware version.

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_LFWRT
Field_Delimited.description: Left Filter Wheel Fast Recirculation Time

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_LFWS
Field_Delimited.description: Left Filter Wheel Speed

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_RFWS
Field_Delimited.description: Right Filter Wheel Speed

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_LFWCS
Field_Delimited.description: Left Filter Wheel Peak Current

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_RFWCS
Field_Delimited.description: Right Filter Wheel Peak Current

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_RFWRT
Field_Delimited.description: Right Filter Wheel Fast Recirculation Time

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_LSLF
Field_Delimited.description: Left Filter Wheel Step Level

Field_Delimited.name: PAN_TM_PIU_HKN_RSLF
Field_Delimited.description: Right Filter Wheel Step Level
